{{Infobox technique
| name = Temporal Field
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

''See also: [[Temporal Field Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Temporal Field is a piece of masterwork [[Aethertech]] that alters an individual's relationship to time. When activated, it allows the user to move at normal speeds while the rest of the world appears to slow down or freeze entirely. While in this state, objects or people that the user personally interacts with become subject to their actions; otherwise, everything remains locked in its original position. The field can be used for rapid movement or to perform tasks while no time passes for the outside world. However, the ability has limitations, such as being used only in short bursts because a human mind cannot pilot [[Starhammer]] during its activation. The field can also be enhanced by sacrificing other system power, though it may eventually flicker and fail. While typically used to grant a speed advantage, certain individuals possess their own versions of the field, allowing them to move normally even when time is frozen for others.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Originally constructed by a deceased [[Aether Technician]], the Temporal Field is an [[Aether]]-dependent system used to manipulate relative time. This technique allows a user, such as [[Sola]] or [[Starhammer]], to slow the world around them and realign their personal relationship to time to move faster than others. While the field can provide warnings and interfere with camera footage, it also ensures that anything a user personally interacts with becomes subject to their actions.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Temporal Field]] is a technique that slows the world around the user.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Temporal Field]] interferes with camera footage.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c14">''The Engineer'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Temporal Field]] can provide warnings.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A [[Temporal Field]] can alter a being's relationship to time, allowing them to move faster than others.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c16">''The Engineer'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Temporal Field]] realigns the user's relationship to time.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] possesses a [[Temporal Field]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Temporal Field]] is a technique that can be used to manipulate relative time.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c37">''The Engineer'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The original [[Temporal Field]] was built by a deceased [[Aether Technician]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Under the effects of a [[Temporal Field]], anything personally interacted with becomes subject to the user's actions.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Temporal Field]] is an [[Aether]]-dependent system.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Temporal Field]] is a technique used by [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Regarded as a masterwork of [[Aethertech]], the Temporal Field is a specialized ability utilized by [[Sola]]'s clones. This power allows for the freezing of time around a specific target. During its activation, the field creates conditions that prevent [[Mell]] from piloting the [[Starhammer]]. [[Sola]] herself has engaged this ability to successfully freeze time.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Temporal Field]] is considered a piece of masterwork [[Aethertech]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Temporal Field]] is an ability engaged by [[Sola]]'s clones.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Temporal Fields can stop time around a target.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Mell]] cannot pilot [[Starhammer]] during the activation of the [[Temporal Field]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Sola]] engaged her [[Temporal Field]] to freeze time.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|What about the Aether Technician who built the original Temporal Field?

“Oh, they’re dead. Very dead.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Engaging Temporal Field,” five voices reported.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
